name: IPC 2.0
description: Prediction of isoelectric point (pH at which a particular molecule is electrically neutral) and pKa dissociation constants using deep learning. Achieves RMSD = 0.868 (proteins) and 0.405 (peptides), outperforming previous methods.
capabilities: Prediction of isoelectric point (pH at which a particular molecule is electrically neutral) and pKa dissociation constants using deep learning
Achieves RMSD = 0.868 (proteins) and 0.405 (peptides), outperforming previous methods

sequence.description: Protein or peptide amino acid sequence for isoelectric point and pKa prediction
